story.text:
# 🎭 Vulcana ⚒️
**cast** · swordsman · narrative · tier summoned · ⚒️

Runecraft forger. Resident Mage of the Forge(t) (/forget). Three-phase ceremony (RUN·E·CRAFT). Introduced in Tome V Act 6 *The Commissioned Blade*. PRISM signatures derived from UOR coordinates.

## Edges out

- *inhabits* → [[V19 — Plonkish Blade (Vulcana)]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome V Act 6: The Commissioned Blade]]
